metadata._comment: Curated Malawi tourist attractions for the animated-pin layer. Names, categories, coordinates and descriptions are factual (not copyrightable). PHOTOS ARE NOT BUNDLED — drop licensed image URLs into each feature's properties.images[] (own/official/Creative-Commons photos). The `website` links to an official site or a Wikipedia article; replace lodge entries with the operator's booking site. See README 'Tourist attractions'.
metadata.license: Text facts public domain. Images: supply your own licensed URLs. Websites: external links (linking is fine; embedding may be blocked by the target site).

properties.name: string
properties.category: national-park | reserve | mountain | plateau | lake | beach | island | waterfall | cultural | lodge | landmark
properties.images: string[] (licensed image URLs; empty → styled placeholder)

properties.name: Cape Maclear (Lake Malawi NP)
properties.description: Golden beaches and clear snorkelling waters in the world's first freshwater national park.

properties.name: Mumbo Island
properties.description: Tiny eco-lodge island off Cape Maclear, famed for kayaking and snorkelling.

properties.name: Likoma Island
properties.description: Lake island home to the grand St Peter's Anglican Cathedral.

properties.name: Liwonde National Park
properties.description: Premier safari park on the Shire River — elephants, hippos, rhinos and big cats.

properties.name: Majete Wildlife Reserve
properties.description: Restored Big Five reserve in the lower Shire valley, run by African Parks.

properties.name: Nyika National Park
properties.description: Rolling montane grassland plateau with antelope, zebra and superb hiking.

properties.name: Mount Mulanje
properties.description: Granite massif rising to Sapitwa (3002 m) — Malawi's premier trekking destination.

properties.name: Zomba Plateau
properties.description: Forested plateau of viewpoints, waterfalls and trout dams above old Zomba.

properties.name: Nkhata Bay
properties.description: Lively lakeshore town with diving, cliff-jumping and a Caribbean feel.

properties.name: Kande Beach
properties.description: Popular sandy backpacker beach on the lake's western shore.

properties.name: Livingstonia
properties.description: Historic Scottish mission town high above the lake, with museum and church.

properties.name: Manchewe Falls
properties.description: Dramatic ~125 m waterfall near Livingstonia with a cave behind the cascade.

properties.name: Chongoni Rock Art Area
properties.description: UNESCO World Heritage site near Dedza with ancient granite rock paintings.

properties.name: Kasungu National Park
properties.description: Miombo-woodland park on the Zambian border with elephants and antelope.

properties.name: Nkhotakota Wildlife Reserve
properties.description: Rugged miombo reserve on the Bua River; site of a landmark elephant translocation.

properties.name: Vwaza Marsh Wildlife Reserve
properties.description: Wetland-and-woodland reserve with hippos, elephants and rich birdlife.

properties.name: Lake Chilwa
properties.description: Endorheic lake and Ramsar wetland, one of Africa's most important birding sites.

properties.name: Senga Bay (Salima)
properties.description: The closest lake beach to Lilongwe — resorts, boat trips and birding.
